title: "Internal Error" when set some signals public_flat_rw

features.name: public_flat_rw metacomment on signal in concatenation context
features.description: Code should include a signal with /*verilator public_flat_rw*/ metacomment that is part of a concatenation used to drive a large unpacked array

features.name: large unpacked array with packed dimension
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array of regs where the packed dimension exceeds 256 bits, used in clocked always block assignments

features.name: unpacked array element read from clocked always block
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array element assigned in a clocked always block that is read in a separate combinational always block
